title: Kristen Stewart and ‘Full Phil’ Cast Get Lively 5-Minute Cannes Ovation Despite Mixed Response to Quentin Dupieux’s Absurd Comedy
content:
ByEllise Shafer

Kristen StewartandWoody Harrelson’s star power shone brightly inside the Palais at the premiere of their new film, the absurd father-daughter comedy “Full Phil” from French musician and filmmaker Quentin Depieux. Before the screening began, Depieux and his cast, including Charlotte Le Bon and Emma Mackey (whose last film, “Ella McCay,” was a massive hit in France), earned loud applause from what looked like a full house. The audience for the midnight screening was rowdy and ready to see their favorite celebrities on screen.

The surreal comedy elicited laughter throughout, but ultimately seemed to fall flat with the crowd. As the credits rolled, the audience clapped politely. When the lights came up, fans stood and cheered for the cast. Stewart indulged the fans by pulling faces at the camera and waving up to the balcony; as the clapping went on, she danced in place and did her best to divert attention back to her co-stars.

“Full Phil” stars Stewart and Harrelson as a father-daughter duo who travel to Paris in an attempt to reconnect. However, French cuisine, a 1950s horror movie and a nosy hotel employee interrupt their stay. Besides Stewart, Harrelson and Mackey, “Full Phil” also stars Emma Mackey, Charlotte Le Bon, Tim Heidecker and Eric Wareheim.

Dupieux was last at Cannes with his 2024 comedy “The Second Act,” which opened that year’s festival. Stewart was on the Croisette last year to premiere her directorial debut “The Chronology of Water,” starring Imogen Poots as a swimmer overcoming addiction, which received critical acclaim.

In aninterview withVariety, Stewart said she had been “dying” to work with Dupieux due to his DIY approach. “I love his movies. They just don’t look or feel like anyone else’s, and those are the types of directors that actors are so lucky to be able to follow,” she said. “He holds the camera at all times. You are with him, connected completely. He knows how he’s going to edit it by the end of the day. If he’s missing a shot, he gets it. He’s beyond an auteur, he’s like a mastermind.”
title_zh: 克莉絲汀·史都華(Kristen Stewart)和《全滿》(Full Phil)的演員們在戛納影展上獲得了熱烈的五分鐘掌聲，儘管昆汀·杜皮厄(Quentin Dupieux)的荒謬喜劇反應不一。
content_zh:
由艾莉斯·謝弗(ByEllise Shafer)報導

克里斯汀·史都華(Kristen Stewart)和伍迪·哈里森(Woody Harrelson)的明星魅力在他們的新片《全心全意(Full Phil)》首映式上於巴黎的帕萊斯(Palais)閃耀光芒，這部荒誕的父女喜劇由法國音樂家和導演昆廷·杜皮厄(Quentin Depieux)執導。在放映開始之前，杜皮厄和他的演員陣容，包括夏洛特·勒龐(Charlotte Le Bon)和艾瑪·麥基(Emma Mackey)（她的上一部電影《艾拉·麥凱(Ella McCay)》在法國大獲成功），獲得了觀眾的熱烈掌聲。午夜場的觀眾熱情高漲，迫不及待想在銀幕上看到他們最喜愛的明星。

這部超現實喜劇在整個放映過程中引發了笑聲，但最終似乎未能引起觀眾的共鳴。當片尾字幕滾動時，觀眾禮貌地鼓掌。燈光亮起時，粉絲們站起來為演員們歡呼。史都華對粉絲們表示熱情，對著鏡頭做鬼臉並揮手致意；隨著掌聲持續，她在原地跳舞，努力將注意力轉回到她的共演者身上。

《全心全意(Full Phil)》講述了史都華和哈里森飾演的父女二人前往巴黎試圖重建聯繫的故事。然而，他們的住宿被法國料理、1950年代的恐怖電影和一名愛管閒事的酒店員工打斷。除了史都華、哈里森和麥基，《全心全意(Full Phil)》還有艾瑪·麥基(Emma Mackey)、夏洛特·勒龐(Charlotte Le Bon)、蒂姆·海德克(Tim Heidecker)和埃里克·瓦雷海姆(Eric Wareheim)參演。

杜皮厄最近在2024年戛納影展上以他的喜劇《第二幕(The Second Act)》亮相，該片為當年影展的開幕片。史都華去年在克羅伊塞特(Croisette)首映了她的導演處女作《水的時間(The Chronology of Water)》，該片由伊莫金·普茨(Imogen Poots)主演，講述一名游泳運動員克服成癮的故事，並獲得了好評。

在接受《綜藝(Variety)》的訪問時，史都華表示她一直“渴望”與杜皮厄合作，因為他的DIY風格。“我喜歡他的電影。它們看起來和感覺都與其他人的不同，這就是演員們能夠跟隨的導演類型，”她說。“他始終掌握著攝影機。你與他完全連接。他知道到最後一天他將如何剪輯。如果他缺少某個鏡頭，他會補上。他不僅僅是一位作者，簡直像是一位大師。”
summary_zh:
由艾莉斯·謝弗(ByEllise Shafer)報導

克里斯汀·史都華(Kristen Stewart)和伍迪·哈里森(Woody Harrelson)的明星魅力在他們的新片《全心全意(Full Phil)》首映式上於巴黎的帕萊斯(Palais)閃耀光芒，這部荒誕的父女喜劇由法國音樂家和導演昆廷·杜皮厄(Quentin Depieux)執導。
